# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|----------|
| latest  | ✅ |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

HELIOS CODEX takes security seriously. We operate on a $1T+ collateral protocol — every vulnerability matters.

**DO NOT open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Please report to: security@galactic-union.org

We will respond within 24 hours. Critical vulnerabilities may be eligible for our bug bounty program.

## Quantum Security

The VULCAN protocol implements post-quantum cryptography across all sensitive operations. See [HELIOS-VULCAN](https://github.com/GALACTIC-UNION/HELIOS-VULCAN) for details.
